title: Bhagavad Gita Discourse
desc: Weekly satsang exploring key verses from the Bhagavad Gita with guided meditation and Q&A.

title: Rigveda Chanting Circle
desc: Join scholars and practitioners for a deep-dive into Vedic chanting traditions and their significance.

title: Sanskrit for Beginners
desc: An introductory workshop on reading Devanagari script and understanding basic Sanskrit grammar.

title: Upanishads Study Group
desc: Monthly reading circle focused on the principal Upanishads — open to all levels of seekers.
